textPlain: If you like quartz watches that expose their circuitry, you'll definitely enjoy some of Accutron's watches: https://www.hodinkee.com/articles/introducing-accutron-314While usually not on display, the quartz movements of Grand Seikos are beautifully finished:* https://i.imgur.com/sJXfmg1.jpeg* https://i.imgur.com/BucSW15.jpeg* https://i.imgur.com/xVd04BM.jpeg* https://i.imgur.com/wuRSif1.jpeg
Interesting concept. Bigger screen less casing would be nice, but very good concept
Very cool. Keep on keepin on.
